title: pavonia xanthogloea
intro: Pavonia xanthogloea, also known as yellow mallow, is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pavonia xanthogloea include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Pavonia xanthogloea are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
